description_en: Create a traditional Chinese square table with a flat top and apron under the top. The table should have four legs, each with a slight curve at the base.

components.name: top_board
components.description: The flat top of the table

components.name: apron
components.description: The apron under the top of the table

components.name: leg
components.description: The legs of the table, with a slight curve at the base

style_notes: The table should reflect Ming or Qing dynasty style with symmetrical proportions and traditional joinery techniques. Legs should be slightly curved at the base to enhance the aesthetic.
